hero.title: I build scalable systems that handle millions of events.
hero.subtitle: I am Saket Sinha. I engineer high-throughput, zero-downtime backend architectures. Specializing in Java Spring Boot, Kafka, and LLM integrations, I build resilient distributed ecosystems that seamlessly process millions of transactions.

points.title: Strictly Autonomous
points.description: Systems that are built to manage themselves using AI-driven anomaly detection and self-healing architectures.

points.title: Observable Tech
points.description: If you cannot measure it, it doesn't exist. We instrument telemetry natively, guaranteeing visibility at scale.

projects.title: Scalable Event-Tracking Microservice
projects.description: Designed a scalable event-tracking architecture ingesting 1M+ daily events. Improved forensic traceability and reduced incident investigation time by 40%.

projects.title: Data Warehouse Optimization
projects.description: Replaced Amazon Redshift with PostgreSQL, cutting data-warehouse cost by 60% (~$80K) and reducing query latency from 5s to 1.5s.

projects.title: LLM-Assisted Engineering
projects.description: Integrated LLM-powered developer tooling for Github Copilot, improving internal code-quality, documentation generation, and accelerating development velocity by 20%.

blogs.title: Modernizing Legacy Systems from Java 8 to 21
blogs.summary: Strategies for raising throughput and reducing memory consumption during major version upgrades.

blogs.title: Integrating LLMs seamlessly with microservices
blogs.summary: Exploring RAG, prompt engineering, and intelligent automation in real products.

experience.description: Architecting large-scale Spring Boot microservices, optimizing data-warehouse solutions, and pioneering AI/LLM integrations for developer productivity.
experience.impact: Reduced Redshift costs by 60%, ingested 1M+ daily events, and improved peak-load memory consumption by 25%.

experience.description: Enhanced large-scale MDM products with automation frameworks and explored AI-driven anomaly detection for mobile device behavior.
experience.impact: Reduced manual test cycles by 30% and delivered a 7% efficiency improvement across enterprise device fleets.

experience.description: Leveraged Java, Spring Boot, Neo4j, and PostgreSQL to build high-performance, scalable POC microservices handling 2K+ concurrent users.
experience.impact: Achieved 15% faster data retrieval and consistently demonstrated an 8% improvement in system responsiveness.

experience.description: Integrated core banking services (T24 Temenos, Finacle). Implemented Master-Slave replication systems and custom Tomcat load balancers.
experience.impact: Boosted TPS by 12% via server protocol optimization and data packet chunking over concurrent servers.

github.summary: Core contributor to high-performance systems, exploring Neo4j, Kafka, and LLM implementations.

certifications: Prompt Engineering: How to Talk to the AIs
